collectors.name: Ashley Wall
collectors.notes: Largest collector. Loves high-energy originals and responds well to first-look access.
collectors.recommendedAction: Send a personal first-look note with 2 pieces that feel like her strongest color-forward lane.

collectors.name: Jordan Silver
collectors.notes: Has bought multiple times, often around gifting moments.
reasons: collector historically converts around personal milestones
collectors.recommendedAction: Warm check-in around gifting season or new small-format work that is easy to place.

collectors.name: Maya Chen
collectors.notes: Engaged twice, likely responsive to fresh minis or under-$1.5k shortlist.
collectors.recommendedAction: Share a tight mini-drop shortlist with one low-friction reply prompt.

collectors.name: Erin Patel
collectors.notes: First purchase went well, but relationship never graduated into collector rhythm.
collectors.recommendedAction: Reconnect with a styling-led note and invite her to reply with a room photo for recommendations.
